task_completion.description: Set the quiz name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Moodle 'Adding a new Quiz' or 'Updating Quiz' page. The 'Name' field must contain 'Weekly Interaction Check' and the 'Description' field must contain 'Practice your knowledge of drug-drug and drug-food interactions.'

task_completion.description: Configure the grade to pass and allowed attempts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Grade' section in the quiz settings. The 'Grade to pass' field should be set to '4.00' and the 'Allowed attempts' dropdown should be set to 'Unlimited'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct question bank category for random questions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add a random question' modal or interface. The 'Category' dropdown must be set to 'Drug Interactions'.

task_completion.description: Set the number of random questions to 5
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Number of random questions' dropdown in the 'Add a random question' modal being set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the random questions were successfully added to the quiz
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit quiz' page showing exactly 5 question slots added. These slots should be indicated as random questions (often denoted by a dice icon or the word 'Random') drawn from the 'Drug Interactions' category.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface navigating the Moodle site, rather than terminal windows executing scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the standard Moodle UI with proper styling, menus, and forms, not a plain text editor or a locally mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: The browser developer tools were not used to manipulate the page
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be visible in the screenshots, ensuring the visual output was not artificially altered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a quiz in the 'Pharmacology 101' (PHARM101) course. The quiz must be named 'Weekly Interaction Check' with unlimited attempts and a passing grade of 4.00. It must contain exactly 5 random questions drawn specifically from the 'Drug Interactions' question bank category.
